Workato introduced Workato One Platform at event, combining AI and orchestration for enterprise agents.Launch features AgentX Apps.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Workato®, a prominent Enterprise Orchestration platform, unveiled the latest stage of the Agentic Enterprise through Workato One at its Work to the Power of AI event in New York. Workato One serves as the sole platform in the industry that consolidates all essential components for creating and implementing secure, reliable, enterprise-ready agents with complete business context throughout the organization. The company further introduced AgentX Apps™, which are ready-made applications designed for seamless integration within the enterprise ecosystem.

news.headline: Jeeva AI in Santa Monica unveils upgrade to its sales platform with Agentic AI for lead discovery, qualification, and outreach.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, Jeeva AI is preparing to unveil an enhanced version of its AI-driven sales platform, incorporating the innovative Agentic AI technology.

news.headline: Workato acquires DeepConverse, AI support automation company, enhancing enterprise solutions with AI technology.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Workato®, a prominent Enterprise Orchestration platform, has revealed its acquisition of DeepConverse, a support automation platform driven by Generative AI. DeepConverse facilitates AI-fueled search functions, aiding enterprises in automating customer service tasks through its advanced AI platform. Through this acquisition, Workato is emphasizing its dedication to enhancing value for customers and partners by integrating AI-driven support automation features into their product line.

news.headline: Global drone warfare market reached $25.2B in 2024, projected to hit $41.9B by 2030, growing at 8.8% CAGR. Demand for energy-efficient drones rising - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Drone Warfare - Global Strategic Business Report" has been introduced by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Drone Warfare reached a value of US$25.2 Billion in 2024, and it is anticipated to hit US$41.9 Billion by 2030, experiencing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.8% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market tendencies, factors propelling growth, and predictions to assist in making strategic business choices. The landscape of drone warfare is undergoing a significant transformation.

news.headline: Inventor from Cincinnati develops smartwatch G T B WATCH with religious theme providing access to Bible & religious info.
news.summary: A resident of Cincinnati, Ohio, who also serves as a pastor, recently developed a new smartwatch with a religious focus named the G T B WATCH, unveiling it in Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025. The inventor stated that the innovative device provides access to the Bible and various religious content.

news.headline: SPIRE Academy in Ohio shines at Indoor Nationals with 2 national champions and strong placements in other events.
news.summary: In Geneva, Ohio, on March 27, 2025, SPIRE Academy revealed that its track-and-field team achieved success at the Adidas Indoor Track Nationals. The team secured victory in two events and achieved top placements in several others, resulting in the emergence of two national champions.

news.headline: Clarus from Fort Worth, Texas launches Lynk™, a digital glassboard with 250+ apps, multi-point touchscreen, and remote collaboration.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on March 27, 2025, Clarus, a leading company in glassboards, unveiled their latest product, Lynk™. This innovation is a wall-mounted touchscreen writing glassboard equipped with over 250 apps, a multi-point touchscreen, and the capability for real-time remote collaboration. According to Clarus, Lynk™ serves as a valuable teamwork tool that fosters connectivity.

news.headline: PSP Investments appoints Caroline Vermette as CFO and announces new Chief Risk Officer.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, PSP Investments revealed the promotion of Caroline Vermette to the position of Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. This move is part of PSP Investments' strategic plan to strengthen its leadership team. The appointment of Vermette signifies the company's commitment to promoting internal talent and fostering growth within the organization. This announcement comes as PSP Investments continues to expand its operations and manage a significant portfolio valued at [insert number] billion dollars. Additionally, there were other key appointments made within the company, showcasing PSP Investments' focus on talent development and succession planning.

news.headline: Forever 21 holding going-out-of-business sales with massive savings at all stores and online due to bankruptcy filing.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois - On March 27, 2025, Forever 21 commenced Going-Out-of-Business sales as a result of F21 OpCo, the US operating company, declaring bankruptcy. Forever 21, a prominent fashion retailer offering women's, men's, and children's apparel and accessories, is currently in the process of liquidating its inventory. This announcement comes amidst challenging times for the company, signaling the end of an era for a brand that once thrived in the retail industry. Customers can now avail of significant discounts and deals as part of the liquidation process.

news.headline: Avangrid's True North Solar Farm, 238 MW-AC (321 MWdc), achieves commercial operation in Texas, powering data centers.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., part of the Iberdrola Group, has confirmed the commencement of operations for its True North Solar project based in Waco, Texas. This significant milestone marks the largest solar endeavor undertaken by Avangrid, boasting a capacity of 238 Megawatt-AC (MWac) or 321 MWdc. The project not only supports the sustainable powering of U.S. data centers for enhanced grid stability but also solidifies Texas's reputation as a prominent player in national energy generation. True North is actively contributing electricity to the Texas Grid.

news.headline: XRP price drops 2% to $2.34, market cap $136.6 billion. Analyst notes $2 crucial support level. Bitcoin at $87,018.44, market cap $1.72 trillion. Ethereum at $2,009.28, market cap $242.4 billion.
news.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is experiencing bullish sentiment, especially regarding its involvement in stablecoin transactions, despite its price showing little movement. The current price of XRP is $2.34, with a market capitalization of $136.6 billion, showing a 24-hour trend decrease of -2.4% and a 7-day trend decrease of -3.5%. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is priced at $87,018.44, with a market cap of $1.72 trillion, showing a 0.2% increase in the last 24 hours and a 3.3% increase over the last 7 days. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is currently valued at $2,009.28, with a market cap of $242.4 billion, showing a 24-hour trend decrease of -0.4% and a 7-day trend increase of 2.2%. Notably, analyst Ali Martinez highlights $2 as the crucial support level for XRP according to their analysis.

Moody's upgrades Priority's credit rating to B1 from B2 due to solid revenue growth and improved cashflow.
news.summary: Priority, a payments and banking solution based in Alpharetta, Georgia, recently received an upgraded credit rating from Moody’s Ratings. The rating was increased from B2 to B1. This upgrade was attributed to Priority's consistent revenue growth, simplified and cost-effective capital structure, enhanced cash flow generation abilities, and the anticipated reduction in debt burden through improved earnings.

news.headline: Équité Intelligence launches global luxury brand strategy training led by Dr. Daniel Langer, offering insights in brand storytelling and pricing.
news.summary: The freshly launched Équité Intelligence luxury training program is now available online, offering valuable insights for entrepreneurs, professionals, and enthusiasts in various industries. The program includes detailed modules that offer expert guidance on topics like brand storytelling, pricing strategies, and understanding buyer psychology. In addition to self-paced learning, the program also offers customized...

news.headline: Life insurance claims denied for 5 common reasons, experts at Law Offices of Jason Turchin advise on fighting back.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on March 27, 2025, the Law Offices of Jason Turchin, a prominent figure in life insurance litigation nationwide, is spotlighting the prevalent causes for denial of life insurance claims and advising beneficiaries on steps to challenge such decisions. The firm aims to educate the public on the intricacies of insurance claim denials, emphasizing the need for beneficiaries to be informed and proactive in confronting such issues.

news.headline: Goulston & Storrs increases staff in NY with 4 new attorneys specializing in Corporate, Litigation, and Real Estate.
news.summary: Goulston & Storrs, a prominent law firm ranked in the Am Law 200, has expanded its New York office by welcoming four new attorneys. Behzad Malek-Madani, Rae Berger, Steven Ficurilli, and others have joined the firm's Corporate, Litigation, and Real Estate Groups. This announcement was made on March 27, 2025, following the addition of these legal professionals to the team.

Mobile Streams Plc has officially launched its online casino and sportsbook, Estadio Gana, in Mexico, offering sports fans betting opportunities.
news.summary: Mobile Streams Plc (MOS) has recently launched its online casino and sportsbook, previously known as Bet, in Mexico as Estadio Gana. The platform, available at www.estadiogana.mx, has officially been released after a successful testing phase. It caters to Mexican sports enthusiasts by offering access to current global sports news, live match updates, and the option to place bets. Estadio Gana provides a comprehensive Sports Book and Casino experience tailored to Mexico's sports and gaming audience.

AHIP to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025. Conference call on April 1, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. PT. Executives to discuss results.
news.summary: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP, known as AHIP, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, will disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluded on December 31, 2024, post-market closure on Monday, March 31, 2025. For those interested, the Q4 2024 results conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, April 1, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. The call will involve Company leaders presenting and delving into AHIP's financial outcomes while addressing inquiries from analysts. The Company's trading symbols are TSX: HOT.UN, TSX: HOT.U, TSX: HOT.DB.V.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in five years. In addition, the economy added 200,000 new jobs in the past month, showing a positive trend in the labor market. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and growth in the manufacturing sector. The job market is expected to continue improving in the coming months, providing opportunities for those seeking employment. Overall, the data reflects a strengthening economy and a hopeful outlook for job seekers.

news.headline: Comerica Bank's Shred Day on April 12 in DFW includes donations to North Texas Food Bank.
news.summary: As guests drive through the shred lanes, they are encouraged to donate food or money to the North Texas Food Bank. In Dallas on March 27, 2025, Comerica Bank and Iron Mountain Incorporated are partnering to provide shredding services. The initiative aims to support the community, with a specific focus on aiding the North Texas Food Bank. This partnership signifies a collaborative effort to assist those in need.

Adyen Giving passes $25M mark with donations from shoppers globally. Goal set to raise more than €100M by 2030.
news.summary: Adyen has pledged to match all donations made through its Adyen Giving product throughout the year 2025. The company has announced an ambitious fundraising goal of over €100 million (approximately 108 million USD) for Giving by the year 2030. This commitment was revealed in an event held in Amsterdam and San Francisco on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Elizabeth Warren criticizes SEC Chair nominee for alleged crypto 'pre-bribe,' citing concerns over stablecoin legislation.
news.summary: The senator, well-known for being skeptical about cryptocurrencies, has expressed worries about potential conflicts of interest related to legislation regarding stablecoins.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from New York develops the MBQ-628, a closed-circuit radio communication system for enhanced security.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from New York City shared details about a new innovation aimed at addressing the issue of an incomplete closed circuit radio communication (CCRC) system. The inventor expressed confidence in finding a simple solution for this problem through the CCRC. This new design is intended to bolster security measures. The invention has drawn attention due to its potential impact on communication systems, and has created buzz within the innovation community.

news.headline: Rep. Tom Emmer opposes Wyoming's state-issued CBDC, calling it a disguised effort to tokenize currency.
news.summary: The Majority Whip for the GOP declared strong opposition to the project, stating disagreement with any state - whether Republican-led or not - issuing a tokenized form of its currency.

NUS physicists find groundbreaking copper-free superconducting oxide capable of operating at high temperatures.
news.summary: In Singapore on March 27, 2025, Professor Ariando and Dr. Stephen Lin Er Chow from the Department of Physics at National University of Singapore (NUS) introduced a revolutionary new material. This copper-free superconducting oxide has the exceptional ability to superconduct at high temperatures.

news.headline: EFG enhances leadership team with Anthony Olivieri as Director of Training Services and Billy Champion for Powersports team to boost revenue growth.
news.summary: In Dallas, a recent announcement from EFG Companies revealed the promotion of Anthony Olivieri to Director of Training Services within the auto dealers sector. Concurrently, Billy Champion has joined the Powersports team to bolster client profitability. Olivieri's elevation and Champion's appointment are expected to enhance training services and support for clients.
